name: Delhi NCR

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Delhi NCR
hero.subtitle: Delhi, Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad — 2,100+ verified movers across the entire National Capital Region.

intro:
Delhi NCR is India's capital region and one of the country's most demanding relocation markets. ShiftIndia connects you with 2,100+ verified packers and movers covering Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad, Ghaziabad and surrounding NCR districts.

Whether you're moving within South Delhi's leafy neighbourhoods, shifting to a new flat in Noida's sectors, or relocating from a DDA housing society, our KYC-verified vendors understand the capital's diverse housing types, society rules and traffic patterns.
whyUs: Delhi's traffic restrictions, society parking regulations, congested old lanes in Old Delhi and the sheer scale of NCR require movers with proven local expertise. Our vendors plan moves around odd-even restrictions, handle DDA flat lift access, and provide ₹5 lakh damage coverage on every booking.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Delhi NCR?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Delhi NCR start at ₹5,000. A 2 BHK move across NCR (e.g., Delhi to Noida or Gurugram) typically costs ₹8,000–₹16,000 including packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover Noida, Gurugram and Faridabad within the NCR service area?
faqs.a: Yes. Our Delhi NCR network covers all key NCR zones — Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, Gurugram, Faridabad, Ghaziabad and Indirapuram.

faqs.q: Can you move on Delhi's restricted no-entry days for commercial vehicles?
faqs.a: Yes. We know Delhi's commercial vehicle entry restrictions by zone and schedule moves with appropriate vehicle types or during permitted windows to avoid delays.

faqs.q: Do you handle inter-state moves from Delhi to other cities?
faqs.a: Yes. Delhi to Mumbai, Bangalore, Lucknow, Jaipur and Chandigarh are among our top routes. All inter-state moves include GPS tracking and transit insurance.
